race.comment: ZORBRIST (3) has switched yards since a 1.5L defeat 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside just 40 days ago. He rates highly on his recent form and although the wide draw is a query, he can play a leading role. THE TOP BAR (11) went forward and gave a great sight before finishing third when resuming last time out over 1200m at this track. Drawn to take a nice trail just off the speed. Looks well placed so expect another big run. DELICATE RULER (4) was in a different class last time with a dominant all-the-way win by 4 lengths at this track over 1000m. One of the main contenders. HOUSEWIFE (5) has been freshened up since she finished sixth over 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside five-and-a-half weeks ago. Won't find this as tough. Has to be respected in this company. PLAY DICE (1) is not to be discounted on her recent form.
